# Polish

Use this as the final pass before shipping.

## Review areas
- alignment and optical balance
- spacing rhythm
- typography consistency
- copy and label cleanup
- interactive state completeness
- empty/error/loading/success handling
- subtle visual drift from neighboring features

## Rules
- prioritize functional polish before purely cosmetic tweaks
- fix root causes of drift
- avoid over-styling
- remove small defects that make the UI feel unfinished

## Output
- what changed
- why it mattered
- what still remains, if anything
